violations.text: The cutting board on the prep unit is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026
Bottom of shelving in laminate lined cabinet was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026
Open air case was observed in poor repair during time of inspection. Unit was actively being worked on. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2026
The drainage pipe from the food prep sink is lacking an air gap. Drainage pipe has an air break. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025
The following were observed in poor repair: -several ceiling tiles in mop room -walk-in freezer gasket (bottom area) New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026
The drainage pipe from the food prep sink is lacking an air gap. Drainage pipe has an air break. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025

Staff failed to wash their hands between tasks (managing front register to scooping ice for ice machine). Food employees must clean their hands after handling soiled equipment or utensils. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen and service area were lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

Food contact surfaces of the self-dispensing ice machine were observed with an accumulation of black and white residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine must be cleaned and sanitized prior to use. Ice was voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

Hot foods packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients (including sub ingredients), the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025
Boxes of food were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

A condenser in walk-in cooler was observed with a fan cover obstructed with brown paper. PIC states fan is missing. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2025

The drainage pipe from the ice machine and food prep sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025
Refuse area was observed with an accumulation of litter and accumulated foliage. Area to be maintain cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

The following were observed in poor repair: -unfinished wall in back storage room -floor in back storage room (missing tiles; exposed cement) -floors in walk-in cooler; paint/sealant observed peeling and scratched -wall cap in mop room (observed detached and/or missing) -ceiling tiles in mop room (water damage) The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the former drive thru service area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2025
